# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  PIP_CACHE_DIR: "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache/pip"

cache:
  paths:
    - .cache/pip

test:
  stage: test
  image: python:3.11
  before_script:
    - pip install --upgrade pip
    - pip install -r requirements.txt
  script:
    - pip install pytest pytest-cov
    - pytest --cov=. --cov-report=term --cov-report=html
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - htmlcov/
    expire_in: 1 week
  only:
    - branches

build:
  stage: build
  image: python:3.11
  before_script:
    - pip install --upgrade pip
    - pip install -r requirements.txt
  script:
    - pip install build wheel
    - python -m build
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/
    expire_in: 1 month
  only:
    - main
    - tags

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: python:3.11
  before_script:
    - pip install --upgrade pip
    - pip install -r requirements.txt
  script:
    - pip install twine
    - python -m twine upload dist/*
  only:
    - tags
  when: manual
